rulings.Calendar Matter: First Amended Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 03,2022 line 1. PETITIONER TERRA CONLON, ALISON BIGGS First Amended Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. Petitioner is awarded $2,000 for attorneys' fees. (Civil Code 8488(c).) Petitioner's request for costs is denied. Petitioner does not provide authority showing that they are entitled to recover the filing fee. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CHARLOTTE BONIA VS. THE ESTATE OF PRESCOTT ASHE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For A Bond Pursuant To Ccp 1030
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 03,2022 line 3. DEFENDANT THE ESTATE OF PRESCOTT ASHE Motion For A Bond Pursuant To Ccp 1030 is CONTINUED to June 3, 2022 for Defendant to comply with SFRL 2.7B and the Court's April 22, 2022 Order and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and the reply no later than 9:00 a.m. on May 9, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting hew hearing date. rulings.Case Title: JOE K. LUI ET AL VS. ASHLEY N. PAUL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 03,2022 line 4. DEFENDANT ASHLEY PAUL APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT Hearing Required. rulings.Case Title: CARROLL AVENUE SENIOR HOMES, L.P. VS. JESSIE LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 03,2022 line 5. DEFENDANT JESSE LEWIS MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED per CCP 473(b). While there is no declaration from Ms. Chevalier to corroborate Defendant's allegations regarding the hidden Summons and Complaint, Plaintiff provides zero evidence of a public safety issue: e.g. manufacturing of meth. Defendant's request for relief from forfeiture of the lease under CCP 1179 is denied. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
